overview: A single Go-based backend service exposes a todo management REST API, extended with a PATCH endpoint to mark todos as completed. The service handles authentication, validation, persistence, and observability in-process, communicating with clients over HTTP/JSON.
requirements: PATCH /todos/{id}/complete marks a todo as completed
Only completion status and completedAt timestamp are updated
Operation is idempotent for already-completed todos
Returns 200 with updated todo on success
Returns 404 for non-existent todo, 400 for malformed id, 401 unauth, 403 forbidden, 500 server error
Durable, atomic persistence with safe concurrent updates
Logs and metrics emitted without sensitive data

components.name: todo-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
  /todos:
    get:
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
    post:
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/TodoCreate'}
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
  /todos/{id}:
    get:
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: {type: string}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: OK
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
        '404': {$ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'}
  /todos/{id}/complete:
    patch:
      summary: Mark a todo as completed
      security: [{bearerAuth: []}]
      parameters:
        - name: id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: {type: string, format: uuid}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Todo marked completed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Todo'}
              examples:
                success:
                  value: {id: '3f1c...', title: 'Buy milk', completed: true, completedAt: '2026-04-17T10:00:00Z'}
        '400': {$ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'}
        '401': {$ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'}
        '403': {$ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden'}
        '404': {$ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'}
        '500': {$ref: '#/components/responses/ServerError'}
components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
  schemas:
    Todo:
      type: object
      properties:
        id: {type: string, format: uuid}
        title: {type: string}
        completed: {type: boolean}
        completedAt: {type: string, format: date-time, nullable: true}
        ownerId: {type: string}
    TodoCreate:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title: {type: string}
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        code: {type: string}
        message: {type: string}
  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Bad Request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    Unauthorized:
      description: Unauthorized
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    Forbidden:
      description: Forbidden
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    NotFound:
      description: Not Found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
    ServerError:
      description: Server Error
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: {$ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'}
components.componentAgentInstructions: Implement a Go service using net/http on port 9090. Endpoints: GET /health returns 200 JSON {status:'ok'}; standard CRUD for /todos (GET list, POST create, GET /todos/{id}); and the focal PATCH /todos/{id}/complete. Use an in-memory store (map[string]Todo) protected with sync.RWMutex for safe concurrency; persist via simple JSON file write on update to satisfy durability (write-then-rename). Todo struct: ID (uuid string), Title, Completed bool, CompletedAt *time.Time, OwnerID string. Authentication: parse Authorization: Bearer <token> header; treat token as the user id; reject missing/empty with 401 and error body {code:'unauthorized',message:...}. Authorization: compare todo.OwnerID to token user; if mismatch return 403 {code:'forbidden'}. PATCH handler: validate id is a UUID (regex) else 400 {code:'invalid_id'}; lookup todo, 404 {code:'not_found'} if missing; if already completed return the existing record unchanged (idempotent) with 200; otherwise set Completed=true, CompletedAt=time.Now().UTC(), save atomically, return 200 with updated Todo JSON. Reject unknown body fields using json.Decoder.DisallowUnknownFields; empty body is allowed. All error responses share the Error schema. Log each request as structured JSON with fields: ts, method, path, todo_id, user_id, status, latency_ms — do not log tokens or titles. Expose /metrics via Prometheus client_golang with counters todo_complete_requests_total{status}, histogram todo_complete_latency_seconds. Seed a few sample todos at startup. Dockerfile: multi-stage Go 1.22 build, final distroless image, EXPOSE 9090.
